en: It's a sex-hibition. I've taken a photo of my naked body every year for the past 30 years.
Why? Well, I think it's important for women of all ages to see how my body has changed over the years.
ko: 모든 연령대의 여성들이 내 몸이 어떻게 변했는지 보는 게 중요하다고 생각해.

en: I think they have to have a healthy perspective on my body.
ko: 그들은 내 몸에 대해 건강한 시각을 가져야 해.

en: Please look after yourself. You really do look ghastly, darling.
We are trying for a baby. Oh, Claire! We thought you couldn't have them.
What? Why? Well, you just seem a little... Would you just hold on to that?
And there are bottles for topping up on the little bar just inside.
ko: 그리고 안쪽 작은 바에 보충할 수 있는 병들이 있어.

en: I'm the luckiest thing to have you. And, um...
ko: 너를 가질 수 있어서 나는 정말 행운이야.

en: Oh, thank you. Oh, this is beautiful.
This is my very interesting friend Daniel, who's deaf.
ko: 이분은 내 아주 흥미로운 친구 다니엘이야, 그는 귀가 안 들려.

en: I picked him up at a student gallery opening. Utterly fascinating.
ko: 나는 그를 학생 갤러리 개막식에서 만났어.

en: Can't hear a thing, but is a fabulous physical communicator through hands and lips.
ko: 하지만 그는 손과 입으로 훌륭하게 의사소통해.
